operation_mapping.navigate_page: Use OpenClaw browser-navigation tools for 1688 result, product, and supplier pages
operation_mapping.read_visible_content: Use OpenClaw page-reading tools on visible content only
operation_mapping.open_supplier_or_product_link: Open shortlisted supplier and product links within the active OpenClaw run
operation_mapping.write_markdown_report: Write the final supplier-first Markdown report through host file output
operation_mapping.normalize_final_output: Persist a clean canonical report artifact before recording run-result metadata

constraints: Real host capability still needs direct validation in an OpenClaw environment.
notes: This manifest describes the adapter contract, not completed runtime validation.
